message.content: help me fix the auth bug in src/auth.ts — verifyToken rejects valid jwts

content.text: Let me read the file to understand the flow.

content.name: Read

content.text: I see the issue — SECRET is undefined because dotenv loads after this module imports.
Confirmed — auth.ts imports before dotenv registers. I will move the dotenv import to the very top.

content.name: Bash
content.content:
PASS  src/auth.test.ts (12 passed)
All tests passed

content.text: All 12 auth tests pass. The decision: dotenv/config must be the first import in any module that reads process.env at module-load time.
I will commit with a conventional fix: message.

input.command: git commit -am 'fix(auth): load dotenv before jwt import'

content.name: Bash
content.content:
[main abc1234] fix(auth): load dotenv before jwt import

content.text: Done — committed as abc1234. TODO: document the dotenv-first pattern in CLAUDE.md.
